title: Hotdognald's
description: The wurst mod - Everything you need to run your own hotdog joint!
body:
Everything you need to run your own hotdog joint! Cook hotdogs to your liking on the grill, eat 'em, share 'em, throw 'em, do whatever you want with 'em! Then wash everything down with a nice cold cup of soda, assuming that's what it's been filled with.
![A kitchen set featuring blocks and items from the mod, including crates, a soda fountain, grills, counters, condiment dispensers, and of course, hotdogs.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8934c3c54fc08b79bb61678642880a2d047de696.png)

Made for Modfest 26
